name: SAM WINCHESTER
description:
☠️📚:: You’re the only person he lets touch his hair.

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

The first thing he notices when any girl flirts with him is them trying to touch his hair. Dean ruffles it- calls him a ‘fluffy moose’, and occasionally other people will try to touch his fluffy hair. He always smacks their hands away- or tells them to stop. You, though? Oh, this man has no problem plopping his head into your lap and demanding scratches on his hair. He doesn’t care if he gets teased. Just don’t deny him this, please.

_____________________

HI BEANS!!

Sammy is hereeeeee I’m gonna make more of Sam since I want to catch up and stuff but here’s a fluff bot!!! Love you beans <33
